title: Miconia australis
taxonomy: Miconia australis is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It belongs to the genus Miconia and is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of South America. This plant is classified as a shrub or small tree, with a height range of approximately 1-5 meters. The classification of Miconia australis at the species level is further supported by its unique morphological characteristics and genetic analysis. As a member of the Melastomataceae family, Miconia australis shares similarities with other species in the same family.
